Headline: #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman / 115th Temporary Northbound Reroute near Cottage Grove / 111th
ShortDescription: Northbound  4 Cottage Grove and 115 Pullman / 115th buses are temporarily due to street blockage near Cottage Grove / 111th .

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 107th and Cottage Grove, over normal route due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/111th .

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Service Delayed at Illinois Medical District
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are standing at Illinois Medical District due to police activity. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are standing at Illinois Medical District due to police activity.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
